author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Four sites used T::from(count).unwrap_or(one) - the 1.0 fallback silently turned 'sum / n' into 'sum / 1' (returning the sum and calling it the mean).

Replaced each fallback:
- mean / var (impl methods, return FerrayResult<T>): ok_or_else with a typed error propagates failure.
- mean_axis / var_axis (closures with Option<T> return inside reduce_axis): T::from(count).map(...) and T::from(count)? - None masks the cell.

For f32/f64 the conversion never fails in practice, so behavior is unchanged. The fix closes the silent-misattribution hole for any future T where it could fail.

ferray-ma: 184 tests pass, clippy clean. Commit c6a55260.
